summary: Iteration 3 testing for Career DNA Test feature + regressions. Backend smoke (health 0.2.0, careers 25, scholarships 12, categories 8) all pass. Frontend Career DNA quiz works end-to-end: page loads, q1->q10 advances correctly, back button appears from q2+, results screen shows top 3 categories with scores, 6 career recommendations rendered with Technology bias (AI/ML Engineer, Cybersecurity Analyst, Data Scientist, Software Engineer, Game Developer, Entrepreneur/Founder), restart returns to q1. Navbar 'Career DNA' link enabled. Regressions: /scholarships renders 12 cards and Undergrad filter shrinks to 7. /careers, /streams, /classes navigate fine.
passed: Picking 'a' for all 10 questions reaches dna-results screen
dna-top-cat-0/1/2 visible with category names and points (Technology 15, Business & Finance 6, Core Engineering 5)
6 career recommendations rendered with data-testid=dna-recommended-{slug} linking to /careers/:slug (includes Data Scientist, AI/ML Engineer, Software Engineer)
dna-back-btn appears from q2 onward and returns to previous question
dna-back-btn correctly NOT shown on q1
Navbar 'Career DNA' link present and routes to /career-dna
/scholarships renders 12 cards; Undergrad filter shrinks to 7
notes: Review request mentioned testid 'dna-recommended-career-pathfinder-135' but actual implementation (and intended) is 'dna-recommended-{slug}'. The 'career-pathfinder-135' looks like a deployment slug confusion. Functionality is correct.
Auth UI and AI Mentor remain DEFERRED with 'Soon' badge as instructed — not flagged.
